# Text-to-Speech Skill for Master Alex

**Status:** Active
**Version:** 3.0.0
**Last Updated:** April 2026

## What This Skill Does

Cloud-based speech synthesis via Replicate for narration, audiobooks, voice cloning, and content creation. Uses MiniMax Speech, Chatterbox Turbo, and Qwen TTS models.

**Note**: The VS Code extension's built-in Edge TTS feature was removed in v7.4.0. This skill now covers Replicate cloud TTS only.

## Files

```text
text-to-speech/
├── SKILL.md         # Complete skill documentation
├── synapses.json    # Connection mapping
└── README.md        # This file
```
- `project-management` → Stakeholder pitch generation
